advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the steps to update the HP ISP Tool Hub?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides the steps to update the HP ISP Tool Hub, including opening the GLHubDriver.exe, installing Driver Ver 1.7, opening the HP_ISPTool.exe, and checking the target device.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the TargetDeviceChecker class and the TargetDevice.ini file?
questions.justification: The synthesis text explains that the TargetDeviceChecker class and TargetDevice.ini file are used to compare the target device to avoid flashing firmware to an unexpected device, and it provides the steps for this process.

questions.question: What is the format of the TargetDevice.ini file?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides an example of the TargetDevice.ini file format, including the FwAvailable, MaskString, and VendorString settings.
